overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic coastal city street at dusk, featuring neon-lit storefronts, palm trees, and dynamic lighting under an overpass. The scene transitions from an open highway view to a covered walkway with shifting colored neon lights, ending with a stairway ascent. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-quality cinematic rendering with wet reflective streets and vibrant artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal highway at dusk, with the distinctive 'El Guapo' building and palm trees visible against a deep blue sky. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, passing modern commercial buildings with reflective wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: following the player character walking along the neon-lit commercial street

notable_agents.action: player character in white top and shorts walking steadily along the sidewalk

large illuminated advertising screens displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a player character walking past vibrant orange neon storefronts and digital billboards. The El Guapo building and palm trees recede from view as the character progresses deeper into the commercial district, with traffic continuing to flow on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with dynamic colored neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered overpass area with green neon ceiling lights
neon lighting shifts from green to magenta and pink as walking progresses

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor under the overpass with shifting colored lights

rectangular light panels embedded in the ceiling cycling through green, pink, and blue colors

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts dramatically to colored neon panels cycling through green and pink hues. The open sky becomes mostly obscured by the overpass structure, and other pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to upper pedestrian level

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete stairway to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs leading up from the covered walkway to the upper platform

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow safety strip leading upward
blue metal handrails along the stairway
elevated pedestrian walkway visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the ascent of a concrete stairway illuminated by purple and blue neon lights. The camera climbs toward an upper level platform, leaving the covered walkway behind, with other pedestrians also using the stairs in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open coastal highway at dusk into a densely lit, neon-saturated urban corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, passing the El Guapo building and palm trees under a deep blue sky with reflective wet pavement. As the camera follows a character deeper into the commercial district, the open vista recedes and is replaced by vibrant orange neon storefronts and digital billboards. The scene then shifts beneath an elevated highway into a semi-covered walkway, where the open sky vanishes and the lighting transforms into cycling panels of green and pink hues. Finally, the camera ascends a concrete stairway illuminated by purple and blue neon lights, climbing toward an upper platform as pedestrians move in both directions.
